requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio Approval （NTA） for Power Banks with Integrated / Wireless Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成/无线电子元件移动电源的EMC与无线电核准（NTA）
requirement_topic.zht: 整合/無線電子元件行動電源的EMC與無線電核准（NTA）

summary.en: Nepal does not operate an EU-style mandatory horizontal EMC marking regime （there is no CE-equivalent EMC directive enforced at import for general electronics）. Electromagnetic compatibility expectations, where they exist, follow IEC/CISPR-based standards adopted as Nepal Standards by NBSM for scheduled categories. The decisive Nepal-specific control is radio: power banks with wireless functionality （Qi wireless charging, Bluetooth state-of-charge, NFC） fall under the Nepal Telecommunications Authority （NTA）. NTA administers type approval / equipment acceptance for telecommunications and radio equipment, including authorisation of the frequency bands and RF parameters permitted in Nepal. A wireless-enabled power bank therefore requires NTA type approval before lawful import and sale, typically supported by an internationally recognised RF/EMC test report and the in-country importer.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔不实行欧盟式强制横向EMC标志制度（一般电子产品在进口环节没有等同于CE的EMC指令强制执行）。在存在EMC要求之处，遵循NBSM为已列入类别采用为尼泊尔标准的IEC/CISPR类标准。尼泊尔特有的决定性管控在于无线电：含无线功能（Qi无线充电、蓝牙电量、NFC）的移动电源由尼泊尔电信管理局（NTA）管辖。NTA对电信及无线电设备实行型号核准/设备验收，包括对尼泊尔允许的频段及射频参数的授权。因此，含无线功能的移动电源在合法进口和销售前须取得NTA型号核准，通常以国际认可的射频/EMC测试报告及本地进口商为支撑。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾不實行歐盟式強制橫向EMC標誌制度（一般電子產品在進口環節沒有等同於CE的EMC指令強制執行）。在存在EMC要求之處，遵循NBSM為已列入類別採用為尼泊爾標準的IEC/CISPR類標準。尼泊爾特有的決定性管控在於無線電：含無線功能（Qi無線充電、藍牙電量、NFC）的行動電源由尼泊爾電信管理局（NTA）管轄。NTA對電信及無線電設備實行型號核准/設備驗收，包括對尼泊爾允許的頻段及射頻參數的授權。因此，含無線功能的行動電源在合法進口和銷售前須取得NTA型號核准，通常以國際認可的射頻/EMC測試報告及本地進口商為支撐。

standards_or_laws: Telecommunications Act, 2053 （1997）, Nepal — NTA mandate over telecom/radio equipment
NTA equipment type-approval / type-acceptance procedures — Nepal Telecommunications Authority
IEC/CISPR-based EMC standards adopted as Nepal Standards by NBSM where the category is scheduled （e.g., CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 equivalents）

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products follow GB/T 9254.1 （emissions） and GB/T 17618 （immunity）. Products with wireless functions require SRRC （State Radio Regulation of China） type approval administered by MIIT, specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. SRRC approval and Chinese GB/T EMC reports demonstrate Chinese domestic compliance, but they are issued against Chinese frequency allocations and are not a Nepal NTA approval. The underlying RF/EMC test data, where produced to international （IEC/CISPR, ITU） references, can support an NTA application but does not replace the NTA grant itself.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求遵循GB/T 9254.1（辐射）和GB/T 17618（抗扰度）。含无线功能的产品须取得由工业和信息化部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。SRRC核准及中国GB/T EMC报告证明中国国内符合性，但其依据中国频率分配出具，并非尼泊尔NTA核准。底层射频/EMC测试数据若依据国际（IEC/CISPR、ITU）参考出具，可支持NTA申请，但不替代NTA授予本身。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求遵循GB/T 9254.1（輻射）和GB/T 17618（抗擾度）。含無線功能的產品須取得由工業和信息化部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。SRRC核准及中國GB/T EMC報告證明中國國內符合性，但其依據中國頻率分配出具，並非尼泊爾NTA核准。底層射頻/EMC測試數據若依據國際（IEC/CISPR、ITU）參考出具，可支持NTA申請，但不替代NTA授予本身。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment （SAC/SAMR）
GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics （SAC）
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Two distinct points: （1） EMC — Nepal has no standalone mandatory EMC marking equivalent to the EU EMC Directive, so there is no CE-style EMC gap for general power banks; where NBSM schedules a category, IEC/CISPR-based NS apply and a Chinese GB/T 9254 report may need re-mapping to the IEC/CISPR reference. （2） Radio — this is the real Nepal gap: a wireless-enabled power bank needs NTA type approval against Nepal-permitted frequency bands and power limits. Chinese SRRC approval is issued for Chinese spectrum and is not transferable; the device must not transmit in NTA-prohibited bands, and the importer must lodge the NTA application with supporting international RF test evidence. Wireless designs tuned for the Chinese market may need re-characterisation for Nepal spectrum rules.
gap.zh: 两个不同要点：（1）EMC——尼泊尔没有等同于欧盟EMC指令的独立强制EMC标志，因此一般移动电源不存在CE式EMC差距；当NBSM将某类别列入时，适用IEC/CISPR类NS，中国GB/T 9254报告可能须重新映射到IEC/CISPR参考。（2）无线电——这是真正的尼泊尔差距：含无线功能的移动电源须依据尼泊尔允许的频段及功率限值取得NTA型号核准。中国SRRC核准针对中国频谱出具，不可转移；设备不得在NTA禁用频段发射，进口商须以国际射频测试证据为支撑向NTA提交申请。针对中国市场调校的无线设计可能须为尼泊尔频谱规则重新表征。
gap.zht: 兩個不同要點：（1）EMC——尼泊爾沒有等同於歐盟EMC指令的獨立強制EMC標誌，因此一般行動電源不存在CE式EMC差距；當NBSM將某類別列入時，適用IEC/CISPR類NS，中國GB/T 9254報告可能須重新映射到IEC/CISPR參考。（2）無線電——這是真正的尼泊爾差距：含無線功能的行動電源須依據尼泊爾允許的頻段及功率限值取得NTA型號核准。中國SRRC核准針對中國頻譜出具，不可轉移；設備不得在NTA禁用頻段發射，進口商須以國際射頻測試證據為支撐向NTA提交申請。針對中國市場調校的無線設計可能須為尼泊爾頻譜規則重新表徵。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless — NTA type approval required before import/sale of power banks with wireless functions; EMC has no standalone mandatory marking equivalent to the EU EMC Directive, IEC/CISPR-based NS apply only where the category is scheduled by NBSM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China （administered by MIIT）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For power banks, the decisive Nepal control is radio approval: wireless-enabled units require NTA type approval against Nepal-permitted frequencies, and Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer. Nepal has no standalone mandatory EMC marking equivalent to the EU EMC Directive, so non-wireless power banks face no CE-style EMC gap; where NBSM schedules a category, IEC/CISPR-based NS apply. Exporters should plan NTA type approval for any wireless variant via the in-country importer, supported by international RF/EMC test data.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于移动电源，尼泊尔的决定性管控是无线电核准：含无线功能的型号须依据尼泊尔允许频率取得NTA型号核准，中国SRRC核准不可转移。尼泊尔没有等同于欧盟EMC指令的独立强制EMC标志，因此非无线移动电源不存在CE式EMC差距；当NBSM将某类别列入时，适用IEC/CISPR类NS。出口商应通过本地进口商为任何无线型号规划NTA型号核准，并以国际射频/EMC测试数据为支撑。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於行動電源，尼泊爾的決定性管控是無線電核准：含無線功能的型號須依據尼泊爾允許頻率取得NTA型號核准，中國SRRC核准不可轉移。尼泊爾沒有等同於歐盟EMC指令的獨立強制EMC標誌，因此非無線行動電源不存在CE式EMC差距；當NBSM將某類別列入時，適用IEC/CISPR類NS。出口商應通過本地進口商為任何無線型號規劃NTA型號核准，並以國際射頻/EMC測試數據為支撐。
